plot.title: Plot
plot.description: Represents a physical plot in Meherunnesa Society

plotNumber.description: The plot identification number, e.g. A-1

sizeKatha.description: Size of the plot in Katha units

pricePerKatha.description: Price per Katha in Bangladeshi Taka

totalPrice.description: Total price of the plot in Bangladeshi Taka

facing.description: Under what direction the plot faces, e.g. South, North-East

roadWidth.description: Road width adjacent to the plot, e.g. 20ft main road

block.description: The sector or block of the plot

notes.description: Additional text details about the plot

booking.title: Booking Request
booking.description: Represents a customer's inquiry or booking request for a plot

setting.title: Setting
setting.description: Represents any page settings, contact numbers, or metadata

plots.description: A collection containing land plots and their availability info

bookings.description: User requests for callbacks, plot bookings, and questions

settings.description: Key-value settings stored dynamically in Firestore
